nodes.name: sciona.mint.axial_attention
nodes.conceptual_summary: Grouped atoms sharing an upstream family or module.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: Replaces singleton atom subpackages with a flat module layout.

nodes.name: rowselfattention
nodes.description: Applies row-wise self-attention, a mechanism that computes pairwise similarity scores across row positions to produce context-aware representations. Each row attends to all other rows, weighted by learned relevance.
nodes.type_signature: (x: np.ndarray, self_attn_mask: np.ndarray, self_attn_padding_mask: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray
nodes.conceptual_summary: Direct callable atom in the consolidated module.
nodes.critic_notes: Signature derived from the Python wrapper definition.

nodes.name: row_self_attention
nodes.description: Applies row-wise self-attention, a mechanism that computes pairwise similarity scores across row positions to produce context-aware representations. Each row attends to all other rows, weighted by learned relevance.
nodes.type_signature: (x: torch.Tensor, self_attn_mask: torch.Tensor | None, self_attn_padding_mask: torch.Tensor | None) -> tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]
nodes.conceptual_summary: Direct callable atom in the consolidated module.
nodes.critic_notes: Signature derived from the Python wrapper definition.
